title: Segfault on a syntax error involving the IS operator
description:
drh added on 2014-10-02 21:25:52:
The following SQL statement generates a segfault in the parser when it
really should generate a syntax error.
SELECT 1 IS #1;
This problem has existed since the generalization of the IS and NOT IS
operators, five years ago, in check-in [98853f6104076c50ea92175e1].
key_bug_features: Segfault on syntax error with IS operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, flag BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0);
SELECT value IS NULL FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE flag = 1 AND value IS NOT NULL;
